---
title: "Pomacentrid Opsin Relative Expression Single"
author: "Eirlys"
date: "26/01/2022"
output: html_document
---
###SINGLE SWS1 / SWS2B


```{r load-packages, include=FALSE}
#load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(wesanderson)
library(resrepo)
library(writexl)
```

```{r load-data}
#load pom sg object from explr_DE script
load(path_resrepo("/data/intermediate/p08_differential_expression/s02_differential_expression/pom/data_objects/pom_sg"))
```

```{r counts-object}

#subset sg object to get the counts and make gene ID's a column
counts <- as.data.frame(sg$abundance) %>% rownames_to_column()

#subset the counts to only the opsin genes using gene ID's
counts <- counts %>% filter(rowname == "49YYQ" |  #sws1
                            rowname == "49S2W")  #sws2b


#make gene names the rownames 
counts <- column_to_rownames(counts)

counts
```

```{r split-counts}
#split counts into seperate df for each ind (Make sure split correctly!)
atr1_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,1])     
atr2_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,2]) 
atr3_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,3])
atr4_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,4])

#flip df
atr1_df <- as.data.frame(t(atr1_counts))
atr2_df <- as.data.frame(t(atr2_counts))
atr3_df <- as.data.frame(t(atr3_counts))
atr4_df <- as.data.frame(t(atr3_counts))

#relabel 
colnames(atr1_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(atr2_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(atr3_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(atr4_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 

#find relative expression for each gene
atr1_df$SWS2B_cone <- (atr1_df$SWS2B / (atr1_df$SWS1 + atr1_df$SWS2B))*100
atr1_df$SWS1_cone <- (atr1_df$SWS1 / (atr1_df$SWS1 + atr1_df$SWS2B))*100

atr2_df$SWS2B_cone <- (atr2_df$SWS2B / (atr2_df$SWS1 + atr2_df$SWS2B))*100
atr2_df$SWS1_cone <- (atr2_df$SWS1 / (atr2_df$SWS1 + atr2_df$SWS2B))*100

atr3_df$SWS2B_cone <- (atr3_df$SWS2B / (atr3_df$SWS1 + atr3_df$SWS2B))*100
atr3_df$SWS1_cone <- (atr3_df$SWS1 / (atr3_df$SWS1 + atr3_df$SWS2B))*100

atr4_df$SWS2B_cone <- (atr4_df$SWS2B / (atr4_df$SWS1 + atr4_df$SWS2B))*100
atr4_df$SWS1_cone <- (atr4_df$SWS1 / (atr4_df$SWS1 + atr4_df$SWS2B))*100

```


```{r}
#remove extra columns
atr1_df <- atr1_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
atr1_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(atr1_df))
colnames(atr1_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
atr1_df2$individual <- c("atrilobata1","atrilobata1")
atr1_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
atr1_df2
```

```{r}
#remove extra columns
atr2_df <- atr2_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
atr2_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(atr2_df))
colnames(atr2_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
atr2_df2$individual <- c("atrilobata2","atrilobata2")
atr2_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
atr2_df2
```

```{r}
#remove extra columns
atr3_df <- atr3_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
atr3_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(atr3_df))
colnames(atr3_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
atr3_df2$individual <- c("atrilobata3","atrilobata3")
atr3_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
atr3_df2
```

```{r}
#remove extra columns
atr4_df <- atr4_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
atr4_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(atr4_df))
colnames(atr4_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
atr4_df2$individual <- c("atrilobata4","atrilobata4")
atr4_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
atr4_df2
```


```{r}
all_exp_atr <- rbind(atr1_df2,atr2_df2,atr3_df2,atr4_df2)

 all_exp_atr %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individual, y = counts, fill = individual)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(gene))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()

all_exp_atr %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individual, y = counts, fill = gene)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()

all_exp_atr %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gene, y = counts, fill = gene)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(individual))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()
```

###################################################################

```{r mul-split-counts}
#split counts into seperate df for each ind (Make sure split correctly!)
mul1_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,5])     
mul2_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,6]) 
mul3_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,7])
mul4_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,8])

#flip df
mul1_df <- as.data.frame(t(mul1_counts))
mul2_df <- as.data.frame(t(mul2_counts))
mul3_df <- as.data.frame(t(mul3_counts))
mul4_df <- as.data.frame(t(mul4_counts))

#relabel 
colnames(mul1_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(mul2_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(mul3_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(mul4_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 

#find relative expression for each gene
mul1_df$SWS2B_cone <- (mul1_df$SWS2B / (mul1_df$SWS1 + mul1_df$SWS2B))*100
mul1_df$SWS1_cone <- (mul1_df$SWS1 / (mul1_df$SWS1 + mul1_df$SWS2B))*100

mul2_df$SWS2B_cone <- (mul2_df$SWS2B / (mul2_df$SWS1 + mul2_df$SWS2B))*100
mul2_df$SWS1_cone <- (mul2_df$SWS1 / (mul2_df$SWS1 + mul2_df$SWS2B))*100

mul3_df$SWS2B_cone <- (mul3_df$SWS2B / (mul3_df$SWS1 + mul3_df$SWS2B))*100
mul3_df$SWS1_cone <- (mul3_df$SWS1 / (mul3_df$SWS1 + mul3_df$SWS2B))*100

mul4_df$SWS2B_cone <- (mul4_df$SWS2B / (mul4_df$SWS1 + mul4_df$SWS2B))*100
mul4_df$SWS1_cone <- (mul4_df$SWS1 / (mul4_df$SWS1 + mul4_df$SWS2B))*100
```


```{r mul1}
#remove extra columns
mul1_df <- mul1_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
mul1_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(mul1_df))
colnames(mul1_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
mul1_df2$individual <- c("multilineata1","multilineata1")
mul1_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
mul1_df2
```

```{r mul2}
#remove extra columns
mul2_df <- mul2_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
mul2_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(mul2_df))
colnames(mul2_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
mul2_df2$individual <- c("multilineata2","multilineata2")
mul2_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
mul2_df2
```

```{r mul3}
#remove extra columns
mul3_df <- mul3_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
mul3_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(mul3_df))
colnames(mul3_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
mul3_df2$individual <- c("multilineata3","multilineata3")
mul3_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
mul3_df2
```

```{r mul4}
#remove extra columns
mul4_df <- mul4_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
mul4_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(mul4_df))
colnames(mul4_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
mul4_df2$individual <- c("multilineata4","multilineata4")
mul4_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
mul4_df2
```



```{r}
all_exp_mul <- rbind(mul1_df2,mul2_df2,mul3_df2,mul4_df2)

 all_exp_mul %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individual, y = counts, fill = individual)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(gene))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()

all_exp_mul %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individual, y = counts, fill = gene)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  #facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(individual))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()

all_exp_mul %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gene, y = counts, fill = gene)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(individual))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()
```

################################################################

```{r cya-split-counts}
#split counts into seperate df for each ind (Make sure split correctly!)
cya1_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,9])     
cya2_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,10]) 
cya3_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,11])
cya4_counts <- as.data.frame(counts[,12])

#flip df
cya1_df <- as.data.frame(t(cya1_counts))
cya2_df <- as.data.frame(t(cya2_counts))
cya3_df <- as.data.frame(t(cya3_counts))
cya4_df <- as.data.frame(t(cya4_counts))

#relabel 
colnames(cya1_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(cya2_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1") 
colnames(cya3_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")  
colnames(cya4_df) <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")  

#find relative expression for each gene
cya1_df$SWS2B_cone <- (cya1_df$SWS2B / (cya1_df$SWS1 + cya1_df$SWS2B))*100
cya1_df$SWS1_cone <- (cya1_df$SWS1 / (cya1_df$SWS1 + cya1_df$SWS2B))*100

cya2_df$SWS2B_cone <- (cya2_df$SWS2B / (cya2_df$SWS1 + cya2_df$SWS2B))*100
cya2_df$SWS1_cone <- (cya2_df$SWS1 / (cya2_df$SWS1 + cya2_df$SWS2B))*100

cya3_df$SWS2B_cone <- (cya3_df$SWS2B / (cya3_df$SWS1 + cya3_df$SWS2B))*100
cya3_df$SWS1_cone <- (cya3_df$SWS1 / (cya3_df$SWS1 + cya3_df$SWS2B))*100

cya4_df$SWS2B_cone <- (cya4_df$SWS2B / (cya4_df$SWS1 + cya4_df$SWS2B))*100
cya4_df$SWS1_cone <- (cya4_df$SWS1 / (cya4_df$SWS1 + cya4_df$SWS2B))*100
```


```{r cya1}
#remove extra columns
cya1_df <- cya1_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
cya1_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(cya1_df))
colnames(cya1_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
cya1_df2$individual <- c("cyanea1","cyanea1")
cya1_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
cya1_df2
```

```{r cya2}
#remove extra columns
cya2_df <- cya2_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
cya2_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(cya2_df))
colnames(cya2_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
cya2_df2$individual <- c("cyanea2","cyanea2")
cya2_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
cya2_df2
```

```{r cya3}
#remove extra columns
cya3_df <- cya3_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
cya3_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(cya3_df))
colnames(cya3_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
cya3_df2$individual <- c("cyanea3","cyanea3")
cya3_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
cya3_df2
```

```{r cya4}
#remove extra columns
cya4_df <- cya4_df[,c(3:4)]

#flip back
cya4_df2 <- as.data.frame(t(cya4_df))
colnames(cya4_df2) <- "counts" 

#add species column and updat column names 
cya4_df2$individual <- c("cyanea4","cyanea4")
cya4_df2$gene <- c("SWS2B","SWS1")

#check
cya4_df2
```


```{r}
all_exp_cya <- rbind(cya1_df2,cya2_df2,cya3_df2,cya4_df2)

 all_exp_cya %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individual, y = counts, fill = individual)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(gene))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()

all_exp_cya %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = individual, y = counts, fill = gene)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  #facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(individual))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()

all_exp_cya %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = gene, y = counts, fill = gene)) +
  geom_col() +
  ylim(0,100)+
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(individual))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Zissou1", n = 4)) +
theme_minimal()
```

```{r all-graph}
all_exp <- rbind(all_exp_atr, all_exp_mul, all_exp_cya)
all_exp$species <- c("atrilobata","atrilobata",
                     "atrilobata","atrilobata",
                     "atrilobata","atrilobata",
                     "atrilobata","atrilobata",
                     "multilineata","multilineata",
                     "multilineata","multilineata",
                     "multilineata","multilineata",
                     "multilineata","multilineata",
                     "cyanea","cyanea",
                     "cyanea","cyanea",
                     "cyanea","cyanea",
                     "cyanea","cyanea")

all_exp$species <- factor(all_exp$species, levels = c("atrilobata", "multilineata", "cyanea"))
```

```{r final-plot}
#find mean of individuals for plot
my_sum <- all_exp %>%
  group_by(species, gene) %>%
  summarise( 
    n=n(),
    mean=mean(counts),
    sd=sd(counts)
  ) %>%
  mutate( se=sd/sqrt(n))  %>%
  mutate( ic=se * qt((1-0.05)/2 + .5, n-1))

#plot mean
 p1 <- my_sum %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = species, y = mean, fill = as.factor(species))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  ylim(0,100) +
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(factor(gene))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#00cc99", "#4473c4", "grey95"),
                    labels=c("A. atrilobata (TEP)","A. multilineata (CAR)", "A. cyanea (CAR)"),
                    name = "Species") +
theme_classic() +
   theme(text = element_text(size = 20),
         axis.text.x = element_blank(),
         axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +
   labs(y = "Relative Opsin Expression (%)")
 p1
```

###SAVE RESULTS

```{r save-plot}
ggsave(path = path_resrepo("data/intermediate/p10_opsins/pom/s02_pom_opsin_exp_single"),
       filename = "pom_single_cone_exp.png",
       height = 5,
       width = 10,
       plot = p1)
```

```{r save-data}
#save mean relative expression 
write_xlsx(x = my_sum,
           path =  path_resrepo("data/intermediate/p10_opsins/pom/s02_pom_opsin_exp_single/pom_single_mean_ops_exp.xlsx"))

#save individual relative expression
all_exp <- all_exp %>% rownames_to_column("opsin")
write_xlsx(x = all_exp,
           path = path_resrepo("data/intermediate/p10_opsins/pom/s02_pom_opsin_exp_single/pom_single_ind_ops_exp.xlsx"))

#save raw counts 
counts <- counts %>% rownames_to_column("opsin")
write_xlsx(x = counts,
           path = path_resrepo("data/intermediate/p10_opsins/pom/s02_pom_opsin_exp_single/pom_single_raw_ops_counts.xlsx"))
```
